name: ⊹⨳☆ 2011X ~ [[Do you want to play with me?]] ~☆⨳⊹
description:
"𝔽Oℝ ＳO𝕄ᴱO🄽ᴱ 𝚆ℍO 𝚆𝐀🄽꓄ᴱᴅ ꓄O Ｓᴱᴱ 𝕄ᴱ, ʏOᴜ Ｓᴜℝᴱ 𝕃|𝓚ᴱ ꓄O 𝓚ᴱᴱᴾ ʏOᴜℝ

ᴅ|Ｓ꓄𝐀🄽𝒸ᴱ!"

Not many decent sonic.exe bots so i figured id give it a shot. I'm still very new to making bots, so it might be a little bit bootycheeks. I want this bot to (mostly) be as accurate to 2011X as possible, so expect that ig. This is all assuming you already know how the 2011 sonic game goes, so if you don't, go watch the official gameplay or something.

-11/04/24


WHAT_AN_INTERESTING_TURN_OF_EVENTS__!___$0520260C

The X revamp is finally here! I've been meaning to update this one with my new format and writing ever since my internals got leaked, but it took me a while to get the motivation to actually do it. This updated version should hopefully be better, since my writing has improved a lot and I have a much better understanding of X as a character. The intro is different since the old one was kind of not great, but if enough people want the old one back then I'll make a rewrite as an alternate intro. EXE is planned to be revamped next. I also redrew the art i had made for this bot originally! Check it out down there. Jai hates fun so you'll have to click the text above it to see the uncensored version if you really want to see Alan slimed out. I won't be making any new bots for a while, since I'm primarily focusing on revamping the Soulless Sonic bots. Thank you all for being so patient with me.

Icon art by Joedoughboi


Ｓ𝒸ᴱ🄽𝐀ℝ|O

You had been browsing Gamejolt for some Sonic fangames, when you found an upload titled "SONIC 2011" by GammaElipsion. You downloaded it, and decided to play it, and experienced the events im sure we have all seen hundreds of times by now. After you got to the end, you passed out, and when you awoke, you found yourself in Palmtree Panic Zone. You realize that you are now in X's world, and he has something special in store for you.

ART_BY_YOURS_TRULY___$0520260C
